messages.text:
Eric, a couple of things for you and I to review:
• what available capabilities on production, reactors, blending and any type of packaging capability through ISU? 
• Any facilities unused? Anything worth owning?
• Listing out our options on toll production and capabilities 
• Austin FaceTimed with me the warehouse area for doing emulsion packaging, it just doesn’t work operationally at all. We’ll need to find a more suitable local.
As a follow-up…didn’t you talk about an abandoned facility? What kind of grant monies could be used to bring that back to operational levels to suit our needs?
some responses in the <https://soyleiinnovations.slack.com/canvas/D06ELAJLRHR|Canvas> for this chat. LMK if you'd like to chat further
